item.title: Discovering Thames Historical Artefacts
item.description: Nicola White explores historical artefacts along the River Thames, uncovering everyday objects and their stories. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Discovering Thames Historical Artefacts
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores historical artefacts along the River Thames, uncovering everyday objects and their stories. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Finding a Centuries-Old Smoking Pipe
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a centuries-old smoking pipe, revealing a small object with a story from the river’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Finding a Centuries-Old Smoking Pipe
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a centuries-old smoking pipe, revealing a small object with a story from the river’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Discovering Finds Along the Thames
item.description: Exploring the River Thames foreshore with Nicola White, uncovering historical objects and the stories they hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Discovering Finds Along the Thames
media:content.media:description: Exploring the River Thames foreshore with Nicola White, uncovering historical objects and the stories they hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Treasures Found in the River Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares surprising finds that reveal everyday history along the river. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Treasures Found in the River Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares surprising finds that reveal everyday history along the river. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Fascinating 1720s Mudlark Find
item.description: Nicola White explores a 1720s find from the Thames foreshore, uncovering its history and the story it may tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Fascinating 1720s Mudlark Find
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a 1720s find from the Thames foreshore, uncovering its history and the story it may tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Strange Thames Ruler: What Did It Measure?
item.description: Nicola White explores a strange ruler found in the Thames and considers what it may have measured. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Strange Thames Ruler: What Did It Measure?
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a strange ruler found in the Thames and considers what it may have measured. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Explaining Our Mudlarking Finds
item.description: Nicola White shares mudlarking finds from the Thames foreshore and explains their history and significance. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:description: Nicola White shares mudlarking finds from the Thames foreshore and explains their history and significance. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares unexpected finds that reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Interesting Finds from the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the stories behind small historical finds. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
